fields.Name: Rasa.io - Get Person
fields.Description: Retrieves a single Person record from Rasa.io by its external ID

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The unique ID of the Person record to retrieve

fields.Name: Record
fields.Description: The retrieved Person record with all fields

fields.Name: Rasa.io - Search Person
fields.Description: Searches for Person records in Rasa.io matching the given field filters

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100)

fields.Name: HasMore
fields.Description: Whether more pages of results exist

fields.Name: Rasa.io - List Person
fields.Description: Lists Person records from Rasa.io with cursor-based pagination

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return per page (default: 100)

fields.Name: Cursor
fields.Description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page (from previous ListResult)

fields.Name: Records
fields.Description: Array of Person records in this page

fields.Name: HasMore
fields.Description: Whether more pages of results exist

fields.Name: NextCursor
fields.Description: Cursor to pass for the next page

fields.Name: TotalCount
fields.Description: Total number of records, if known
